items.title: UK petrol and diesel prices fall after weeks of rises
items.summary: Drivers have seen weeks of increases as the US-Israeli war with Iran pushed up wholesale oil prices.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Middle East crisis live: UN chief calls for Israel-Lebanon ceasefire to be ‘fully’ respected as it comes into effect
items.summary: António Guterres welcomes truce and says he hopes halt in fighting will ‘pave the way for negotiations’ In case you’re just joining us, here are the latest developments in the M...

items.title: In northern Israel, relief at the cease-fire is overshadowed by unease.
items.summary: Residents are wary that the truce may offer only a temporary reprieve after weeks of rocket fire by Hezbollah.
